zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid von Dillingen於1166年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特時，她的父親Hartman III von Dillingen28歲，母親Richenza von Lenzburg32歲。她和Ludwig von Württemberg III至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid von Dillingen于1166年出生在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特时，她的父亲Hartman III von Dillingen28岁，母亲Richenza von Lenzburg32岁。她和Ludwig von Württemberg III至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Dillingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Dillingen near Augsburg or Tüllingen in Baden.

English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Drellingore in Kent, recorded as Dillynger in 1264, from the Old English personal name Dylla + -ing-, denoting association, + Old English ōra ‘hill slope’.

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid von Dillingen was born in 1166, in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany, her father, Hartman III von Dillingen, was 28 and her mother, Richenza von Lenzburg, was 32. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Ludwig von Württemberg III.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid von Dillingen est née en 1166, à Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Hartman III von Dillingen, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Richenza von Lenzburg, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Ludwig von Württemberg III.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid von Dillingen 1166 in Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hartman III von Dillingen 28 und ihre Mutter Richenza von Lenzburg 32. Sie hatte mit Ludwig von Württemberg III mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Dillingen è nata il nel 1166 nel Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Hartman III von Dillingen, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Richenza von Lenzburg, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Ludwig von Württemberg III.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Dillingenが1166年にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ストゥットガートで生まれた時，父Hartman III von Dillingenは28歳，母Richenza von Lenzburgは32歳であった。彼女はLudwig von Württemberg IIIとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid von Dillingen(이)가 1166년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hartman III von Dillingen(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richenza von Lenzburg(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Ludwig von Württemberg III(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid von Dillingen nasceu em 1166, em Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Hartman III von Dillingen, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Richenza von Lenzburg, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Ludwig von Württemberg III.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid von Dillingen родилась в 1166 г. в местности обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Hartman III von Dillingen было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Richenza von Lenzburg, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Ludwig von Württemberg III.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid von Dillingen nació en 1166, en Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Hartman III von Dillingen, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Richenza von Lenzburg, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Ludwig von Württemberg III.
